name: Base Reference Transfer
description: Generate standard-pose candidates from a reference image, combining BiRefNet cleanup, IPAdapter identity/style transfer, and OpenPose pose control.

inputs.description: Uploaded source character image. Defaults to the job reference image.
Character identity, outfit, style, and target standard pose prompt.
Things to avoid, especially bad hands, background, dynamic pose, and source-image scene residue.
OpenPose-style standard pose guide. Defaults to the plugin bundled pose.
